summary: Unit conversion feature testing COMPLETE. All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass: Step 2 shows native/converted units, Step 4 shows conversion indicator, Modifier buttons work correctly. End-to-end submission with GJ to MJ conversion successful.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes/units.py: UNIT_DIMENSIONS properly defines all 5 dimensions (energy, distance, mass, volume, monetary) with correct conversion factors
Backend routes/activities.py: Lines 123-133 properly handle frontend conversion data; Lines 186-194 correctly store original_quantity, original_unit, conversion_factor
Backend models/__init__.py: ActivityCreate model properly includes optional conversion fields (original_quantity, original_unit, conversion_factor)
Frontend utils/units.js: getAvailableUnitsWithConversions() correctly separates native and converted units
Frontend GuidedEntryModal.js: Step 2 shows native units first, then converted units with 'Autres unités (conversion automatique)' label and dashed border
Frontend GuidedEntryModal.js: convertedQty calculated and displayed correctly in step 4 when user selects converted unit
Frontend GuidedEntryModal.js: handleSubmit() sends original_quantity, original_unit, conversion_factor to backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unit conversion feature fully tested and working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_unit_conversion.py can be used for regression testing.

backend_get_units_dimensions.description: GET /api/units/dimensions returns all 5 dimensions (energy, distance, mass, volume, monetary) with correct conversion factors
backend_get_units_dimensions.details: 6 tests verify all dimensions and their units are correct

backend_activity_conversion_fields.description: POST /api/activities accepts and stores original_quantity, original_unit, conversion_factor fields
backend_activity_conversion_fields.details: Activity created with GJ input stores original values + converted quantity

frontend_step2_native_converted_units.description: Step 2 shows native units AND converted units (with 'conversion automatique' label and dashed border)
frontend_step2_native_converted_units.details: For Combustion fixe > Combustibles: 3 native units (kg, L, MJ), 9 converted units (t, g, lb, m3, gal, kWh, MWh, GJ, therm) with dashed border

frontend_step3_compatible_factors.description: When user selects converted unit, step 3 shows compatible factors
frontend_step3_compatible_factors.details: Selected GJ → 15 compatible factor cards displayed

frontend_step4_conversion_indicator.description: Step 4 shows 'Équivalent: X unit' indicator when converted unit is used

frontend_modifier_buttons.description: Modifier buttons still work after conversion feature
frontend_modifier_buttons.details: Clicking Modifier for unit returns to step 2, 12 unit buttons visible

end_to_end_conversion_submission.description: Create entry with GJ unit for MJ-based factor, verify emissions calculated correctly
end_to_end_conversion_submission.details: 10 GJ → 9999.28 MJ → 0.3070 tCO2e. Modal closed successfully, total bilan increased from 391 to 392 tCO2e
